component.name: Repo Man
component.summary: Manage APT repositories for system upgrades

description.p: Repo Man is a GTK4 graphical tool for managing third-party APT repositories on Ubuntu and Xubuntu. It helps you review, update, and re-enable repositories after a system upgrade, and provides an upgrade wizard that automatically migrates third-party sources to your new Ubuntu release.

ul.li: Browse and edit all third-party APT repositories
Upgrade wizard: checks PPA and repo availability for a target release
Pre-upgrade compatibility checker with per-PPA availability details
Add and remove repositories with GPG key management
Save and restore repository state across upgrades (.repoman files)
Launch Software Updater to apply pending package updates

screenshot.caption: Main window showing the repository list and detail pane
Upgrade wizard step 1 — select repositories to migrate
Upgrade wizard step 3 — review and apply changes
Repository detail pane — edit suite, components, and signing key

ul.li: UI label and button consistency pass across all windows and dialogs
Pre-upgrade compatibility checker renamed consistently throughout (was "pre-update")
CompatChecker button order corrected (Close left, Check right)
Missing repos dialog: Cancel replaces Skip; single primary action button
State file terminology standardized to "state" throughout
Remove phantom dependencies: python3-xlib and gir1.2-packagekitglib-1.0
AppStream screenshots added to metainfo.xml
Help-docs: config reference updated to v2 format with correct key-bundling behaviour
Help-docs: hamburger nav dropdown synced with full site nav
Help-docs: keyboard shortcuts table, companion tools section, cross-machine restore reference
Window positioning code removed; window placement left to the WM
App ID changed to net.tecktron.repoman (owned domain)
Restore wizard: Existing vs Adding redesign — matched repos with a current suite skip network checks and only sync enabled state
Fix: opening URLs now works correctly on Xfce without GNOME portal
Fix: entry_to_repository normalises .list source paths to .sources
Fix: missing repos dialog guards against empty list
Cross-machine restore wizard: 3-page flow with classify, live PPA checks, and confirm/apply
Info popovers on all wizard pages — click any status icon for suite, target, and Launchpad details
Exit menu item (Ctrl+Q) added to Tools menu
Select Disabled button in Remove Multiple Repos dialog
Fix broken icon names on Xubuntu (emblem-ok-symbolic, emblem-synchronizing-symbolic)
.repoman v2 format bundles GPG signing keys and records the saved codename
Loading a file from a different machine adapts suites automatically with PPA availability checks
Polkit helper creates parent directories when writing key files
Fix About dialog showing stale version number
Remove built-in apt update; Ctrl+R now opens Software Updater
